mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cf_notify WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cf_notify (id, user_id, type, title, content, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{isRead}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE cf_notify SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cf_notify WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
